description: You MUST use this skill when implementing, fixing, or refactoring code. Captures evidence artifacts (screenshots, network traces, code diffs, trace session links) into a proof document as you work.

results.query: Make the navbar dropdown shadow more subtle — it looks too heavy on light backgrounds
The sidebar icon labels are getting clipped on narrow screens, fix the truncation
Swap the loading spinner for a skeleton screen on the dashboard cards
Increase the contrast on disabled form fields so they pass WCAG AA
Build a /health endpoint that checks DB and cache connectivity and returns 200 or 503
Wire up email notifications when an invoice transitions to overdue status
Add server-side pagination to the /api/orders listing endpoint
Pull the rate-limiting logic out of the individual route handlers and into a shared middleware
Break the 400-line UserService class into smaller focused domain modules
The session token isn't being cleared on logout — users stay logged in after signing out
You are implementing Task 5: Add a sortable column header to the invoices table. Use the existing DataTable component.
You are implementing Task 11: Persist filter selections in localStorage so they survive page refresh. Write tests first.
What's the best approach for caching API responses in this architecture?
Can you trace how a payment flows through the system end to end?
Which components re-render when the global theme context value changes?
Add a JSDoc comment to parseDate explaining the accepted format strings
Update the architecture decision record for our current auth strategy
Set the default log level to warn in the staging environment config file
Add "strict": true to the root tsconfig.json
Rename the private helper _fmt to _formatLabel inside ChartUtils.ts
